Table of Contents

Interface IVerticalCoordinateSystemGEN

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geometry
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geometry.dll

Provides access to properties of a vertical coordinate system.

[Guid("D9F23920-EE88-4B14-AA07-A526AA1DFC03")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface IVerticalCoordinateSystemGEN

Properties

CoordinateUnit

The linear unit of measure for the vertical coordinate system.

ILinearUnit CoordinateUnit { get; set; }

Property Value

ILinearUnit

Examples

Sample Snippet

Datum

The vertical or horizontal datum of the vertical coordinate system.

IHVDatum Datum { get; }

Property Value

IHVDatum

Examples

Sample Snippet

Remarks

<P>The <STRONG>IClone::IsIdentical</STRONG> method is not implemented. </P>

PositiveDirection

A parameter that determines whether the coordinate system is positive 'up' or 'down'. Use -1 for depths (positive down).

int PositiveDirection { get; }

Property Value

int

Examples

Sample Snippet

Usage

The usage notes of a vertical coordinate system.

string Usage { get; }

Property Value

string

Examples

Sample Snippet

VerticalShift

An offset parameter that changes the origin of the vertical coordinate system.

double VerticalShift { get; set; }

Property Value

double

Examples

Sample Snippet

Methods

GetParameters(ref IParameter[])

Retrieves the PositiveDirection and VerticalShift parameters into an array.

void GetParameters(ref IParameter[] parameters)

Parameters

parameters IParameter[]
